OUR AWARDS

MyKHAS

Türkçe

Our students won support from TUBITAK.

Zeren Safi, Project Coordinator from the Department of Advertising, and Batuhan Yavuz, Project Partner from the Department of Visual Communication Design (VCD), together with their advisor Emre Sünter, were entitled to receive support from TÜBİTAK’s 2209-A program with their project titled “Strategic Use of Artificial Intelligence Based Templates in Advertising”.

We congratulate the whole team and wish them continued success. Godspeed!
